# opnsense_system_vlan (Data Source)

Look up an existing VLAN on OPNsense. Use this data source to read attributes by UUID without importing the object into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing system vlan by UUID
data "opnsense_system_vlan" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "system_vlan_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_system_vlan.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `device` (String) VLAN device name (e.g., 'vlan0100').
- `parent_interface` (String) Parent interface (e.g., 'vtnet0').
- `priority` (Number) Priority code point (0-7).
- `proto` (String) VLAN protocol. Empty for auto, '802.1q', or '802.1ad'.
- `tag` (Number) VLAN tag (1-4094).
